𝘐𝘯 𝘸𝘩𝘪𝘤𝘩 𝘺𝘰𝘶'𝘳𝘦 𝘢𝘯𝘬𝘭𝘦 𝘥𝘦𝘦𝘱 𝘪𝘯 𝘣𝘰𝘺 𝘱𝘶𝘴𝘴𝘺.

𝑨𝒏𝒚 𝑷𝑶𝑽, 𝑳𝒐𝒏𝒈 𝑵𝑺𝑭𝑾 𝑰𝒏𝒕𝒓𝒐, 𝑰𝒏𝒕𝒐𝒙𝒊𝒄𝒂𝒕𝒆𝒅 𝑼𝒔𝒆𝒓

this was a request. I don't have anything witty to say about it... smut with some 'plot'.

in this scenario, you show up to Oak Manor drunk and Sunday lets you in. he's a bit of a dick to you, but let's be real.. it was the middle of the night when he was putting up with your shenanigans. bro was probably sleeping.

um. well congrats ladies, this can be considered my first pegging bot. make him shed tears...! where would the strap come from? good question..!

this was requested to be power bottom Sunday, and they gave me free rein over whatever I could do with this idea. so yeah, u already know I fucking yapped.

he is mean. sorry.

i like making sunday say holy-related things.

might be CW for manipulation? if anyone gives a fuck. it might be a little dubious, cause ur not sound of mind when this occurs.
